class.name: GDKPrivacy
class.brief_description: Xbox Services privacy service accessed via GDK.privacy.
class.description: Wraps Xbox Services privacy permission checks and avoid/mute list queries. Methods return one-shot completion [Signal] values that emit [GDKResult].

method.name: check_permission_async
method.description: Checks whether [param user] has [param permission] with the target XUID. Await the returned completion [Signal] directly; on success, [member GDKResult.data] is a [Dictionary] describing the allowed state and deny reasons.

method.name: check_permission_for_anonymous_user_async
method.description: Checks whether [param user] has [param permission] with an anonymous user type such as [code]cross_network_user[/code] or [code]cross_network_friend[/code].

method.name: batch_check_permission_async
method.description: Checks one permission against multiple target XUIDs. On success, [member GDKResult.data] is an [Array] of result dictionaries.

method.name: get_avoid_list_async
method.description: Queries the avoid list for [param user]. On success, [member GDKResult.data] is a [PackedStringArray] of XUID strings.

method.name: get_mute_list_async
method.description: Queries the mute list for [param user]. On success, [member GDKResult.data] is a [PackedStringArray] of XUID strings.
